title: Balanced divide-and-conquer is n log_b n
statement_informal: Splitting into b parts of size n/b with linear merge gives T(b^k) <= k*b^k (n log_b n); subsumes mergesort (b=2) and ternary (b=3).

cost_model.notes: One general theorem for the balanced n log n regime, any branching factor b.

references: Master theorem; cf. Knuth's divide-and-conquer analyses.
